# Daratumumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Daratumumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Daratumumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>21 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Daratumumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Multiple Myeloma&nbsp; Darzalex&nbsp;is&nbsp;indicated:  in combination with lenalidomide and dexamethasone&nbsp;or&nbsp;with&nbsp;bortezomib,&nbsp;melphalan&nbsp;and prednisone for the treatment of...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（98.1%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（97.4%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（65.1%）</li>
<li>placenta disease（62.8%）</li>
<li>minimally invasive lung adenocarcinoma（62.8%）</li>
<li>GCGR-related hyperglucagonemia（61.8%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（61.5%）</li>
<li>giant cell reparative granuloma（59.4%）</li>
<li>colon inflammatory polyp（58.7%）</li>
<li>dental caries（58.7%）</li>
<li>epidural abscess（58.1%）</li>
<li>prostate adenoid cystic carcinoma（58.0%）</li>
<li>cloacogenic carcinoma（57.6%）</li>
<li>acute articular rheumatism（57.6%）</li>
<li>conduct disorder（57.4%）</li>
<li>intraductal tubulopapillary neoplasm of pancreas（57.4%）</li>
<li>renal artery obstruction（57.2%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（57.2%）</li>
<li>Coronavinae infectious disease（57.2%）</li>
<li>mitral valve stenosis（57.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/daratumumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
